title: Horribly Optimized
description: This mod is designed to optimize Minecraft for bad computers.
body:
# Horribly Optimized **Horribly Optimized** is a mod pack for bad computers. so if you have a bad computer then this mod pack is for you. This mod pack will boost your **FPS** so you will get over _60 FPS_ on **LOW TO MEDIUM SETTINGS**, then you dont have to buy a new computer. |Celeron N4120, 4GB RAM |FPS | |-----------------------|:---------------------:| |Vanilla: |10-14 FPS | |Sodium Only: |14-25 FPS | |Horribly Optimized |70-89 FPS | # Settings for all instances: ## General Settings: **Render Distance:** 6\ **Simulation Distance:** 5\ **Brightness:** 100% **GUI Scale:** 2x\ **Fullscreen Mode:** Exclusive\ **Fullscreen Resolution:** Current/1366x768 (My laptops resoulution)\ **VSync:** OFF\ **Max Framerate:** Unlimited **Attack Indicator:** Crosshair\ **Autosave Indicator:** ON ## Quality Settings: **Improved Transparency:** OFF **Clouds:** OFF\ **Cloud Distance:** 64 Chunks\ **Weather Effect Radius:** 10\ **See-Through Leaves:** OFF\ **Particles:** Minimal\ **Smooth Lighting:** OFF\ **Biome Blend:** 5x5 Blocks\ **Entity Distance:** 100%\ **Entity Shadows:** OFF\ **Show Vignette:** OFF\ **Chunk Fade Time:** 0.75 Seconds **Mipmap Levels:** 4x # Testing Enviorment: **Server:** DonutSMP.net\ **Version:** 26.1.2\ **Loader:** Fabric\ **Resolution:** 1366x768 # OTHER HELPFUL INFORMATION: ## Drag all mods to mods folder: **1.** Download the .mrpack file\ **2.** Go to this website: [mrpack to zip converter](https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/)\ **3.** Scroll all the way down till you see "Use existing mrpack"\ **4.** Drag the mrpack file into the gray box thats labeled "Choose a file..."\ **5.** Wait 5-10 Seconds then click download.\ **6.** Once the download is finished then extract the zip file.\ **7.** Once its done extracting then drag ALL of the jar files to your mods folder ### DISCLAIMER: You may need to use firefox's built in VPN to access the site if your on firefox! # Mod List:
  • 3d-Skin-Layers
  • Almanac
  • AppleSkin
  • BadOptimizations
  • BetterHurtCam
  • Bobby
  • Cloth Config v26.1
  • Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
  • Controlify
  • Dynamic Crosshair
  • EntityCulling
  • Fabric API
  • Fabric Language Kotlin
  • Fabrishot
  • Fast IP Ping
  • FerriteCore
  • ImmediatelyFast
  • Iris
  • LetMeDespawn
  • Lithium
  • Mod Menu
  • More Chat History
  • More Culling
  • No Chat Reports
  • Placeholder API
  • Reese's Sodium Options
  • Resourcify
  • Searchables
  • Shulker Box Tooltip
  • Simple Voice Chat
  • Sodium
  • TierTagger
  • TotemCounter
  • WorldEdit
  • YetAnotherConfigLib
  • Zoomify
  • e4mc
  • uku's Armor HUD
  • ukulib
# Changelog: ## 1.0: - Pack Got Created ## 1.1: - Changed naming to make downloading the right version easier # What im working on for this project: Creating a discord
